method_summary: End-to-end analysis of AI across the complete research lifecycle, organized into four epistemological phases: Creation, Writing, Validation, and Dissemination, studying developments through April 2026.
key_innovation: Identification of a sharp, stage-dependent boundary between reliable assistance and unreliable autonomy in AI systems for research, along with a structured taxonomy, benchmark suite, and tool inventory.
limitations_stated: AI systems still fabricate results under scientific pressure
AI systems fail to judge novelty reliably
Generated ideas often degrade after implementation
Research code lags behind pattern-matching benchmarks
End-to-end autonomous systems haven't consistently reached major-venue acceptance standards
Greater automation can obscure rather than eliminate failure modes
title: AI for Auto-Research: Roadmap & User Guide
